claim_boundary: Implementation and deterministic acquisition policy freeze only; no seen200 production selection, docking label opening, model-result interpretation, binding, affinity, competition, Docking Gold, or experimental blocking claim.
label_access_scope: The zero counters apply to the production seen200 selector and implementation-freeze builder. The identity-only exclusion artifact was materialized separately from an already-open calibration registry using only sample_id and sequence fields; no calibration label value is accepted by or supplied to the selector.
